pi_items.source: Downloaded Chinook database from GitHub and executed ground truth calculation. SQL queries confirmed: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT GenreId) FROM Track = 25 genres, 3503 tracks total. Ground truth Python code found 24 genres with 10+ tracks and 173 outliers.

pi_items.verified_value: Track 'Occupation / Precipice' (TrackId 2820) in TV Shows genre: 5287.0 seconds, Z-score 4.44, confirmed as outlier (>2.0 threshold)
pi_items.source: Downloaded Chinook database. Query: SELECT Name, Milliseconds FROM Track WHERE Name LIKE '%Occupation%'. Result: 5286953 milliseconds (5287.0 seconds). Ground truth calculation confirms Z-score of 4.44 for this track in TV Shows genre.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Chinook sample database, a real, publicly available dataset from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. The database contains 25 music genres with 3503 tracks total, based on real iTunes Library data for tracks/albums/artists. The task requires calculating duration statistics for 24 genres with 10+ tracks. Ground truth generation produces exactly 8 required stats columns (GenreName, TrackCount, MinDurationSec, MaxDurationSec, AvgDurationSec, MedianDurationSec, StdDevDurationSec, CoeffOfVariation) and 6 outlier columns (TrackName, GenreName, DurationSec, GenreAvgSec, ZScore, OutlierType). The database contains 173 total outliers (tracks with |Z-score| > 2). A known reference outlier is the track 'Occupation / Precipice' in the TV Shows genre (5287 seconds, Z-score 4.44), which is confirmed to exist in the database.
